entry.title: Re: Assign WBS elements at item level in Service Order
entry.content:
Hi,

I am also to struggling to post cost and revenue into a WBS element. But we are using classical version of Service ( without item based accounting).

The Internal Order is configured by default. In the configuration mentioned below I am facing the following challenges:

1) I tried to change the controlling type to P ( form the table)- as controlling type is not visible in the config:

The question is does SAP allow posting on WBS level instead of internal Order. Furthermore, it is not allowed to maintain any controlling scenarious:

Can any one confirm if the configuration is available to enable the cost and revenue to be posted to WBS element?

regards

Sam

entry.title: Re: Enriching Readings from MQTT Sensors with the Applicable Manufacturing Context

entry.title: Posting date, document date and entry date in Infocube creation
entry.content:
HiI want to create an infocube for sales profitability. I need important dates like document date, posting date and entry date. Where do I put these date fields ? should I map any of these to 0Calday or should I create a date dimension and put all the dates in it ?

thanks.

entry.title: Re: How to Automatically Delete EC Alerts when Contract E...
Maintenance Item long text at IP17
entry.content:
Dear All , 

Greetings !

I am working on SAP RISE environment . Need to extract maintenance item long text . I can display long text individually at t-code IP17 . Is there any feature available to extract long text of maintenance item en masse ?

Thanking you .

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: ECC-EWM-GTS Export Declaration “Before PGI in EWM” -B...
entry.content: For the GTS to perform the Export declaration, it needs PGI reference, if we trigger PPF interface to GTS after picking, GTS does not perform export declaration. Just want to understand if anybody has experienced similar requirement and how they have managed to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: Advance Workflow in Incentive Management SF configration
entry.content:
Thank you for your response.

I would like to discuss some additional functionalities I have in mind, specifically the possibility of creating a workflow for payment approvals, pipelines, and all document approval for IM.

Due to some issues with the APIs, integration between WF and IM was not possible, so we reached out to SAP for direct database access from WF to IM. However, I am currently unable to find any information or resources regarding the use of direct database access for advanced workflows and incentive management. The SAP Help page at "https://help.sap.com/docs/Advanced_Workflow/b7cb13f8b6a04157a722ad9ddfde4a28/e0800580d0444641b762ae2911231375.html" provides very little information on how this works. There are no examples or anything by seeing which we could understand how it work and how can we solve our problems with it.

entry.title: how to send the PDF file in HTTP Destination request POST method ?
entry.content:
HI

I am trying create HTTP POST request containing PDF file content which will be used for Document Inforamtion Extraction

Component "PICK FILE" being used to upload the PDF file, now i want to pass the file data to the HTTP Destination Request 

the Output of PICK FILE look like this 

I tried to pass PDF data to form-data of HTTP request body like this

But i am getting following Error "No file was uploaded for processing"

Please suggest me how to fix this error

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy 

Thanks for this amazing blog. 
Few questions though, hope you will help.

1. Is there any update when Rise with private with different hyperscaler apart from SAP will support Joule?

2. Will there be feature parity with sap public cloud and private cloud in joule ?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Agent Lifecycle Management
entry.content:
Hi AnjaniAL,

SAP SuccessFactors Agent Lifecycle Management --> Formerly  known as ProducerPro

SAP SuccessFactors Agent Performance Management --> Formerly  known as ProducerPro Enterprise(ICM)

SAP SuccessFactors Agent Performance Management has below features:

Core Features

  1. Rule-Based Payout Management
    • Flexible configuration of payout rules based on KPIs, business goals, and roles.
    • Support for fixed, variable, and tiered commission structures.
  2. Dynamic Incentive Modeling
    • Real-time updates to payout structures to align with changing business objectives.
    • "What-if" scenario analysis to forecast the impact of payout changes.
  3. Quota and Target Management
    • Ability to assign, monitor, and adjust quotas at individual, team, or organizational levels.
    • Integration with historical performance data to set realistic targets.
  4. Real-Time Analytics and Reporting
    • Dashboards for tracking payout trends, profitability, and performance metrics.
    • Drill-down capabilities to analyze individual or team-level performance.
  5. Integration with Enterprise Systems
    • Seamless integration with CRM, ERP, and HRMS platforms for data synchronization.
    • APIs for custom integrations and third-party tool compatibility.

Advanced Features

  1. Compliance and Audit Trails
    • Automated compliance checks to adhere to legal and policy standards.
    • Detailed audit logs for transparency and accountability.
  2. Customizable Payment Schedules
    • Options to support monthly, quarterly, or on-demand payouts.
    • Flexible timelines to accommodate regional or contractual needs.
  3. Dispute Resolution Mechanisms
    • Built-in workflows to handle payout disputes efficiently.
    • Automated validation of claims to reduce manual errors.
  4. Localization and Multi-Currency Support
    • Adaptation to local tax laws, currencies, and compliance requirements.
    • Support for global teams with multilingual interfaces.
  5. Retroactivity
  6. Hold functionality

 

User Experience Features

  1. Intuitive Interface
    • User-friendly dashboards for administrators, managers, and employees.
    • Mobile access for real-time payout insights on the go.
  2. Employee Self-Service Portal
    • Access to detailed payout breakdowns and performance benchmarks.
    • Tools for employees to track their progress toward earning incentives.
  3. Gamification Elements
    • Leaderboards and badges to encourage healthy competition.
    • Real-time notifications on achievements and payouts.

 

 

SAP SuccessFactors Agent Lifecycle Management has below Features:

Core Features

  1. Dynamic Incentive Modeling
    • Real-time updates to payout structures to align with changing business objectives.
    • "What-if" scenario analysis to forecast the impact of other integrated Payout systems payout changes.
  2. Real-Time Analytics and Reporting
    • Dashboards for tracking payout trends, profitability, and performance metrics.
    • Drill-down capabilities to analyze individual or team-level performance.
  3. Integration with Enterprise Systems
    • Seamless integration with CRM, ERP, and HRMS platforms for data synchronization.
    • APIs for custom integrations and third-party tool compatibility.

Advanced Features

  1. Compliance and Audit Trails
    • Automated compliance checks to adhere to legal and policy standards.
    • Detailed audit logs for transparency and accountability.
  2. Localization and Multi-Currency Support
    • Adaptation to local tax laws, currencies, and compliance requirements.
    • Support for global teams with multilingual interfaces.

User Experience Features

  1. Intuitive Interface
    • User-friendly dashboards for administrators, managers, and employees.
    • Mobile access for real-time payout insights on the go.
  2. Employee Self-Service Portal
    • Access to detailed payout breakdowns and performance benchmarks.
    • Tools for employees to track their progress toward earning incentives.
  3. Gamification Elements
    • Leaderboards and badges to encourage healthy competition.
    • Real-time notifications on achievements and payouts.

entry.title: Re: Miro document should not create more than po value
entry.content:
Hi

You could look at configuration checks through OMR6, OMRI etc. However, in this cases, invoices would be created, but posted  with block status

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Calling an IFLOW from SOAPUI leads to Error response...
entry.content:
Hi

Its an password authentication that i have used.

Here is the detailed error.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden
cache-control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate
content-length: 359
content-type: application/soap+xml;charset=UTF-8
date: Mon, 27 Jan 2025 05:55:06 GMT
expires: 0
pragma: no-cache
server: SAP
x-content-type-options: nosniff
x-correlationid: 54df49e3-d298-4208-5aa6-f860a378d30a
x-frame-options: DENY
x-vcap-request-id: 54df49e3-d298-4208-5aa6-f860a378d30a
x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block
strict-transport-security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload;

<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"><soap:Body><soap:Fault><soap:Code><soap:Value>soap:Receiver</soap:Value></soap:Code><soap:Reason><soap:Text xml:lang="en">An internal error occurred during message processing. Please check the logs in the Monitor System Logs</soap:Text></soap:Reason></soap:Fault></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>

~~~~~~~~

Thanks

Vijay

entry.title: Re: electronic document service installation failed
entry.content:
Hi M911 

In EDS logs please check what error it is showing?

Windows:

  • C:\ProgramData\SAP\SAP Business One\Log\SAP Business One EDS

Linux:

  • /var/log/SAPBusinessOne/EDS

In version 2411, there is a certificate related change happen so while perform server tools installation there is a checkbox "Enable certificate verification" and if this checkbox is enabled then you could not use "Self Signed certificate" option(this option you get on installer screen).

Certificate must be valid as per note 3537539 and  should be imported via "reconfiguration wizard".

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Automatic BP Creation of Employees in HCM
entry.content:
I have a requirement where BP of employee should automatically be created when an employee's hiring Action is performed.

 

Is there any Standard Method to automatically create BP of employee when Hired in HCM, without involving ABAP.

 

HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: What will be type system in the SAP Trade Partner when sender is Process direct and message is json?
entry.content:
Hello Team ,

I am trying to activate one agreement using an agreement template under the SAP B2B scenario using SAP trade partner management where sender will be Process direct and a Json message will be sent to TPM from a custom iflow. In this case what should the relevant type system here and the source message format ?

Regards ,

Laboni

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm encountering an issue in ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01 that I hope someone can help me resolve. Whenever I log into the system and execute any transaction, such as SE37, SE38, etc. I immediately get the following error message:

ERROR DBIF_REPO_SQL_ERROR occurred. P1=ABAP-generat (location vhcala4hci_A4H_00-W5)

After this error appears, I’m automatically logged out of the system.

Has anyone experienced something similar or knows what could be causing this? 

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: how to declare a custom field more than 255 characters?
entry.content: I've to develop a custom database table which customer will directly use in SM30 to store data. One of the field has length 500 char. So I'm unable to open Table Maintenance Generator as character field more than 255 is not allowed in TMG(Table Maintenance Generator ). Can anyone please suggest how to solved with this issue?

entry.title: Re: No task list selected Message no. IW322
entry.content:
heck the date of creating TASK list and compare with Order Basic Start date.

Should the same or Order start date greater than task list created date.

entry.title: Re: Link date to datefrom and dateto in calculation view
entry.content:
Hi sarina1

Using time dependent master data is difficult. Typically you choose one date eg last day of the month and you try to find out if it's in the month (which of cause requires that you only have one month and not an interval). Alternatively go for real time dependency using star join and temporal properties in a join.

Read about temporal joins here:

Temporal Joins | SAP Help Portal

Create Temporal Joins | SAP Help Portal

Regards

Kristian

entry.title: To trigger workflow in SAP build process Automation from sapui5 form
entry.content: how can i trigger workflow in SAP build process Automation from sapui5 Form, i want to trigger the process from SAP ui5 form.

entry.title: Re: What you think about code plagiarism?
entry.content:
Code plagiarism is a critical issue in the coding and programming world. It occurs when someone copies or reuses code written by another individual or group without proper acknowledgment or authorization. This can happen in various scenarios, such as academic assignments, open-source projects, or professional software development.

From an ethical standpoint, code plagiarism undermines creativity and the learning process. Students who copy code miss out on understanding fundamental concepts, which affects their skill development. In the professional realm, it can lead to serious legal consequences, especially if the plagiarized code infringes on intellectual property or violates licensing agreements.

Detecting code plagiarism is complex, as it often involves modified or obfuscated code. Advanced methods like syntax analysis, structural comparison, and AI-based tools have become essential in identifying similarities while accounting for minor changes or adaptations.

Addressing code plagiarism requires a multifaceted approach, including educating individuals about intellectual property, fostering ethical coding practices, and utilizing reliable detection tools to maintain integrity and originality in coding projects.

entry.title: Re: How to access custom tables from the scripts in SAP advanced workflow
entry.content:
Greetings,
please share a groovy script for refrence.

entry.title: About BADI_FINS_SUMMARIZE_BSEG
entry.content:
Hi,

The following error occurs when linking to CFIN from public cloud

　　Text:Source document <company code> <document No> <FY> not posted due to inconsistent summarization
　　Message No. :FINS_CFIN_AC_DOC 025

We received a response from SAP that the following BADI implementation is required to resolve the error.

BADI_FINS_SUMMARIZE_BSEG

Since we don't want to summarize BSEG, returning a blank to the below will not fix the error.
How can we use this BADI to avoid summarizing BSEG?

abap_false = ''.

eb_summarize_to_the_max = abap_false
eb_summarize_acct_assignment = abap_false

entry.title: Re: Automatic BP Creation of Employees in HCM
entry.content:
Hi,

Control T77S0 table. There must be configuration. Check it whether set or not.

Go to SM30 table V_T77S0 , select group - HRALX , Semantic abbr. - HRAC, and enter value  - X

entry.title: Re: How to access custom tables from the scripts in SAP advanced workflow
entry.content: Greetings, Could you please provide an example of how you accessed your db from Advance workflows. Do we have to specify the db url, port and id/pass in the groovy script or doest it work directly with sql queries. If you could please provide a groovy script for refrence it would be very helpful. Looking forward for your response.

entry.title: Empower Your Business with AI Agents: Leveraging Joule and the SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Discover how AI agents are revolutionizing business processes and decision-making. This presentation introduces the innovative capabilities of SAP’s Business Technology Platform and Joule, showcasing the transformative potential of AI agents in automating complex workflows, enhancing collaboration, and integrating with business data.

Learn about real-world applications, key design principles, and the upcoming tools for low-code agent development. Join us to explore how AI agents can drive smarter, faster outcomes for your organization.

Register here: https://events.sap.com/sap-btp-2025/en/home

entry.title: Re: CDS views for COBRA & COBRB tables related to settlem...
entry.content:
With regret to say that there's no released CDS view for COBRA and COBRB(settlement rule), if you have requirement to display settlement rules in batches for production orders, could you try to use APP Display Posting Rules - Event-Based.

As for data extraction from table COBRA and COBRB, maybe you can consider to us extract data from backend tables via APP Customer Data Return

And for more details of using this app, see Working with Customer Data Return.

Hope above information helps.

Thanks & Best regards,
Rachel

entry.title: Re: Clear open items in the Public Cloud from the Private Cloud with the help technical clearing or
entry.content: Please remove tag "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance".

entry.title: Re: Multi Re-Use component in single UI application.
entry.content: This works just for standalone application. When integrated to FLP the getId() doesn't work

entry.title: Re: Master database creation failed for SAP ASE 16.0 SP03...
entry.content: 00:0006:00000:00002:2025/01/27 06:06:16.90 server Checking partition 'sysresourcelimits_52' (partition ID 52) of table 'sysresourcelimits'. The logical page size of this table is 2048 bytes. 00:0006:00000:00002:2025/01/27 06:06:16.90 server 00:0006:00000:00002:2025/01/27 06:06:16.92 server Default Sort Order successfully changed. 00:0006:00000:00002:2025/01/27 06:06:16.92 server ASE shutdown after verifying System Indexes. 00:0006:00000:00002:2025/01/27 06:06:16.92 kernel ueshutdown: exiting 00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/27 06:06:16.92 kernel bucket manager consolidator terminating 00:0000:00000:00000:2025/01/27 06:06:16.92 kernel Main thread performing final shutdown. 00:0000:00000:00000:2025/01/27 06:06:16.92 kernel Blocking call queue shutdown.

entry.title: Getting Error when releasing the backup TR and could not create the package.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are encountering an error when attempting to import the Transport Request (TR) by creating a backup TR in the production environment. The error message indicates that 'Error when releasing the backup TR and could not create the package.' We have verified all the objects, and the package is available for all the objects we created.The package being used already exists in the production system. However, this issue only occurs for newly created objects (class, domain, structure). This problem has not been encountered in the quality or staging systems during deployment. We are using the SolMan (Active Control) tool for this deployment activity. 

Note: Upon checking the TADIR table, we found that all the erroneous objects do not have any package assigned in the production system, whereas they do have a package in the QA system.

entry.title: Re: Extend SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 with SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi @JoEng 

Thanks for the well illustrated blog to get familiar with sap build apps. While following the demo shared in this blog, somehow the page parameters are not getting reflected in the backend data. I have created two page parameters & binded them to respective elements from voucher entities through Create Record operation. But while testing the UI with submit button, if i append the page parameters in the url then it does not get reflected in the backend entity. Any suggestions on what I might be missing? 

Thanks

Ankita

entry.title: Re: Authorization restriction based on multi-level catego...
entry.content:
Hello Chinmaya

multilevel categorization uses the authority object  CRM_CATEGO 

3453555  Multilevel Categorization : authorities objects CRM_CATEGO and CRM_SSCCAT

You're not the first customer raising this question and I created this KBA some months ago.

Best regards

Silvia Ventura

entry.title: under Ordinary Depreciation classification we are taken decline balance depreciation net book value
entry.content: under Ordinary Depreciation classification we are taken decline balance depreciation net book value is not zero how we can zero the NBV

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

entry.title: Re: P/L report revenue is showing as negative
entry.content:
Hello,

In Controlling, revenues are displayed with a negative sign.

This is design.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Polish local finance requirement - tax authority related
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for your question. Are you aware of the documentation? https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/bb525a45b55f4a1c9bb32c254affeeec/6b72af4eee274646b541529b8b89fe16.html?locale=en-US. I have forwarded your question again to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM - problem with INB delivery, Express document...

entry.title: Re: Report recurring entries?
entry.content: Hi Sanne, what is the report you mentioned in ECC?

entry.title: Re: how to declare a custom field more than 255 characters?
entry.content:
Do not put large text fields in Table. Use Text objects instead.
If that's not feasible, then Don't put that column in Table control. Create Text area and use that text area to get the longtext and store it in your table.

entry.title: Different catalog views are set, but wrong catalog is shown when "continue buying"
entry.content:
Dear community,

We're trying to find a setup, where our requester in the departments sees a restricted version of catalog "A", but when the procurement department gets a freetext they can use "continue buying" and see a full version of catalog "A" to replace the freetext lineitem, with a catalog item.

The requester shouldn't be able to see all the items in the catalog in the first place. But if he does a freetext and the procurement knows that this item is in the full version, the procurement should be able to switch it.

However, the different catalog views work fine as long as the “Continue Shopping” button is not used. If Procurement colleagues use this button, it will only get the restricted version of the catalog as it will continue to purchase with the requester's rights.

I would appricate any idea to solve this problem 🙂

entry.title: Re: TRM payment reference in Transaction Manager
entry.content: Hello, Thank you very much for your question. Does the following document provide the information you're looking for? https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3198883. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: About BADI_FINS_SUMMARIZE_BSEG
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: How to set default value using @Consumption.filter.de...
entry.content:
`You can use the below code snippet for reference.

Here I have created a copy for view "C_SglGregorianCalMonthToDate" and fixed the parameter P_DateFunction = 'MONTHTODATE'. 

@Consumption.filter: {
          mandatory: true,
          selectionType: #INTERVAL,
          multipleSelections: false }
      @Consumption.derivation: {
                lookupEntity: 'ZC_SglGregorianCalMonthToDate',
                resultElement: 'StartDate',
                resultElementHigh: 'CurrentDate' }
      fkdat                      as BillingDate,

entry.title: how we can write complaint to SAP about our SAP partner and novation process?

I want to know the process to write complain about our SAP partner and also it would be great if you guys update me about the novation process.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: TRM payment reference in Transaction Manager
entry.content:
Hi Slađana,

According to product experts, there is not relevant configuration currently in Public Cloud.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: 回复： Capacity Schedule Table error out every time. in sap...
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you make sure whether LiveCache is successfully installed in your system?
If not, please raise a customer case so that we can check from our side. You can set the component as PP-CFS-SCH-2CL.

Best Regards
Matt

entry.title: After login SAP portal page we want a vendor type selection screen before accessing the iView.
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can somebody please advise. How to enable vendor type selection screen before accessing the iView, after login SAP NW 7.5 portal page.

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Re: Unable to create text id in sales order header and item, In starter system CBC.
entry.content:
Please remove tags other than SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Downpayment Clearing in "Create Supplier Invoice" App
entry.content:
As documented in KBA 2700132 and Note 2690969, currently the down payment is not supported in app "Create Supplier Invoice". Currently you may have to use the MIRO Advanced app as work around.

2700132 - App ID F0859 - Create Supplier Invoice: Downpayments, MAA and Contract Reference - SAP S/4HANA

2690969 - Create Supplier Invoice: Not supported functionality

If you believe this functionality is essential for business processes and useful to other companies as well, you may consider raising a feature request. Please refer to the KBA 2963059 for more details about New Feature Request in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

entry.title: Re: How to create role Z and catalog Z in the Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Added Extensibility tag. Please remove other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Unique Sales Orders from VBPA for a Customer in CDS
entry.content: Use group by in CDS and have proper keys in your CDS.

entry.title: SAP Captcha in SAP CDC - Gigya
entry.content:
SAP has recently launched SAP captcha in SAP CDC (Gigya). In a project Google reCaptcha is in use, which is chargeable. My question is, Will SAP charge for captcha assessments separately, if this will be enabled?

If yes, then where can we get the cost information? Also, do we need to inform SAP before enabling it by an SAP support ticket?

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud TM: prevent freight unit creation for PO...
entry.content:
Dear Dominik,

thanks for your reply. As you've mentioned, creating duplicate purchasing groups could solve this, but from my perspective, this is not a proper solution. For my customers, the buyers should not care whether the PO is transport-relevant or not, the system has to decide this based on a ruleset.

Kind regards

Wolfgang

entry.title: Printing outgoing payment form when added thru AP Invoice (payment means)?
entry.content:
Hi,

In my User Defaults settings for outgoing payments, it is already set to print when adding document.

When I add AP Invoice with payment means, it will automatically add Outgoing payment but the problem is it will not print.

Any way we can auto print when adding outgoing payments thru AP Invoice?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Fiscal Year Change in co.code 8810 possible only after year-end closing 2023
entry.content: Question has been resent

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Item long text at IP17
entry.content:
Greetings,

long texts are stored in table STXH. Maintenance item long text is stored under object MPOS.

Follow discussion bellow on how to extract the text since it is not readable directly from the table

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/long-text-table/td-p/3617211

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: HANA Authorization Fundamental
entry.content:
Hello Manas

I just noticed your clarification and believe you would have already found the answer !!!

In general below sql can be used to transfer grant privileges of a schema to Sys_Repo i.e ownerhsip. This is a mandatroy step executed post creation of any Private schema to avoid privilege issue ,when other than developer tries to access the data from the same schema.

GRANT CREATE ANY, SELECT, EXECUTE, DROP, ALTER, UPDATE, INSERT, DELETE, DEBUG, INDEX ON SCHEMA <XXXXX> TO _SYS_REPO WITH GRANT OPTION;

Regards

Shivkumar

entry.title: unable to visualize Heterogenous graph in sap hana . Getting error as "GRAPH_WORKSPACE_HETERO_NOT_SU
entry.content:
I have created a Heterogenous graph workspace in my sap hana cloud db . 
however when i try to visaulize the same from the UI i am getting this exception .

an exception (error) occurred "GRAPH_WORKSPACE_HETERO_NOT_SUPPORTED" (screenshot attached)

Following is the schema i have used 

 

CREATE SCHEMA SK_GRAPH_SCHEMA2;

SET SCHEMA SK_GRAPH_SCHEMA2;

CREATE COLUMN TABLE user_table (
    user_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255),
    age INT,
    location VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE COLUMN TABLE post_table (
    post_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    content VARCHAR(255),
    timestamp TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE COLUMN TABLE comment_table (
    comment_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    content VARCHAR(255),
    timestamp TIMESTAMP
);


CREATE COLUMN TABLE friend_table (
    friendship_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    user1_id INT NOT NULL,
    user2_id INT NOT NULL,
    since DATE
);

CREATE COLUMN TABLE posted_table (
    post_id INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
    user_id INT NOT NULL
);

CREATE COLUMN TABLE commented_on_table (
    comment_id INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
    post_id INT NOT NULL,
    user_id INT NOT NULL
);

CREATE GRAPH WORKSPACE "social_network"
    EDGE TABLE friend_table KEY COLUMN "FRIENDSHIP_ID"
    SOURCE COLUMN "USER1_ID" REFERENCES "USER_TABLE"
    TARGET COLUMN "USER2_ID" REFERENCES "USER_TABLE"
    VERTEX TABLE "USER_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "USER_ID"
    
    EDGE TABLE "POSTED_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "POST_ID"
    SOURCE COLUMN "USER_ID" REFERENCES "POST_TABLE"
    TARGET COLUMN "POST_ID" REFERENCES "POST_TABLE"
    VERTEX TABLE "POST_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "POST_ID"
    
    EDGE TABLE "COMMENTED_ON_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "COMMENT_ID"
    SOURCE COLUMN "USER_ID" REFERENCES "COMMENT_TABLE"
    TARGET COLUMN "POST_ID" REFERENCES "COMMENT_TABLE"
    VERTEX TABLE "COMMENT_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "COMMENT_ID";

Please advise whether this kind of graph are supported in sap hana graph or what do i need to change?

entry.title: Re: Importing Entities with Semantic of CDS views from S/4HANA On-Premise in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @armaansingla1992 

Thanks a lot for your blog... even if it is a very high-level summary.

During the last months, now and then, I started trying to set up the Semantic Onboarding in my Demo Tenant, but always got stuck at the Live Tunnel connection... and stopped again.

Then last week, I finally wanted to succeed and thanks to your Blog and the two given notes, containing some more - relevant for my S4H 2021 system - I could get running both: Remote Tables and Replication Flows.

Including documentation, notes implementation, and all the relevant tasks, it took about 5 hours. 

In March 2024 at "SAP Data Unleashed" it was the first time, I heard about it, but since then - except your blog - nothing more...

I've been waiting the whole last year for e.g. a SAP Partner Webinar, explaining all those steps in detail, like they did e.g. for Process Insights in 2-3 webinars, how to get it running ... but for Semantic Onboarding, nothing?

Would be interesting to hear or read from others, if Semantic Onboarding is really used, or if majority of Datasphere Admins are  implementing manually the required CDS View extraction for attributes & texts.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP R/3 and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @Poshan,

You could check SAP help to see what additional infrastructure you need depending on your connection type.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: FAQ:Can the default account assignment for a specific transaction be changed
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Incoterm Location 1 - Can it remain empty in BP masterdata and sales order?
entry.content:
Added Master Data tag. Please remove other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: CDS views for COBRA & COBRB tables related to settlem...
entry.content: Thanks Rachel. This info is very helpful.

entry.title: Re: Request to add a column in Tax Reconciliation Account Balance App
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Why are you not utilizing Built-In Support feature in SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
This blog aims to explain the benefits of utilizing the Built-In Support feature in SAP Cloud ALM, as well as provide tips on how to interact with the Incident Solution Matching (ISM) tool. These insights are intended to enhance self-service capabilities when searching for solutions to errors or analyzing and investigating incorrect or unknown behaviors while working with various SAP Cloud ALM scenarios.

What is Built-In Support – example of a good use

Taken from the SAP Learning Journey Getting Started with Support from SAP (Support Accreditation), section Using Self-Service Support to Prevent Cases: Using Built-In Support

“Built-In Support offers a seamless and convenient way to access SAP support resources directly within your application. A user-friendly interface ensures that support content, tools, and SAP support channels are readily available at your fingertips, eliminating the need to navigate away from your work.”

Meaning that if you click on , Built-In Support icon, in the page header from inside the app where you are getting the issue/question, like from a Feature, Built-In Support opens in a side panel on the page:

You will get, after login via SAP Universal ID with linked S-user IDs, the option to Search in the Search Support Knowledge.

“Furthermore, Built-In Support leverages context-aware technology to provide proactive assistance. It automatically suggests solutions, saving you valuable time and effort in troubleshooting and problem-solving. This intelligent system adapts to your needs, making your support experience more personalized and efficient. It relies on natural language processing, AI, and machine learning to deliver relevant and tailored solution recommendations.”

Pay attention that the search results are filtered by the component of this app, and by clicking in the filter you can even select the product, the repository where to make the search: SAP Notes, SAP KBAs, SAP Help Portal and SAP Community Blogs and Posts.

This prefilled SAP Component in the Search Support Knowledge will help to get a first set of recommendations from the Incident Solution Matching ISM, see what is ISM in section: What is Incident Solution Matching ISM.

Screenshot of all repositories shown in Category:

Note: Under Profile – About you can see the component associated to each app:

So, the “context” included in the Built-In Support, Search Support Knowledge, mark the difference for the tailored results.

If still you need to Get Support from SAP, you can do it from the screen before or from the initial one by clicking in Get Support.

“In addition to streamlined access to support resources, Built-In Support also includes a case management feature. This functionality allows you to easily create, update, attach additional documentation, and close support cases, improving your ability to manage and track issues.”

Get Support app will open with the SAP component assigned to each app already filled.

This prefilled SAP Component in the Get Support will help to get a first set of recommendations from the Incident Solution Matching ISM.

My advice is that you describe your issue as concisely as possible.

Provide a detailed explanation of what happened doing what (include steps to reproduce the problem), Expected Outcome and Actual Result.

As much information you entered in the Description text more accurate will be the ISM recommendations.

You will see how the ISM result list: KBA, Notes and SAP Help portal content, SAP Community, are being recalculated online with the information that you are adding/removing in the Description text.

Pay attention because as soon as you click on Create Case button a case will be created without asking for confirmation.

The case will be created with the correct system CLO, correct product SAP Cloud ALM and correct product function SAP Component SV-CLM-IMP-FTR in this case example.

“Built-In Support moves support right into the application, offering context-aware guidance to simplify and accelerate the customer interaction, integrated into the UI of SAP’s cloud solutions. Using natural language processing, artificial intelligence, and machine learning technologies, Built-In Support interprets the user’s unique problem quickly and efficiently, creating a personalized experience and providing best-fit guidance tailored to their situation.”

Please check KBA 3038177 - How to log in Built-In Support and activate support functions for any issue accessing and working with Built-In Support.

What is Incident Solution Matching ISM

From the SAP Learning Journey Getting Started with Support from SAP (Support Accreditation), section Using AI-Guided Support when Creating Cases: Using Incident Solution Matching

“The Incident Solution Matching service is based on artificial intelligence technology helping you to get answers to technical questions faster. As part of our machine learning-empowered support process, it proposes solutions automatically within the case form so users can find support content quickly without searching manually.

  • AI-based machine learning service
  • Continuously learning from support engineer expertise.
  • Automatically suggests solutions from SAP Notes and SAP Knowledge Base Articles.
  • Ranks potential matches based on semantic relevance. “

You can see the answers provided by ISM in the “Our recommendations for your issue” ranked in order of relevance.

“Benefits

  • Faster issue resolution with proposed solutions
  • Locate relevant SAP Notes and SAP Knowledge Base Articles in one step
  • Recommendations continuously improve with more interactions”

ISM will locate relevant SAP Notes, SAP Knowledge Base Articles, SAP Help Portal and SAP Community content in one step.

It is really impressed to see how the ISM recommendations improve with more interactions, more information being added in the Search or in the Description long text. I can state that the results are really accurate from my experience working with this tool.

Note: ISM is also integrated with SAP for Me ‘Get Support’ app but the recommendations are not completely accurate until you are in the step where the product and product function has been added.

SAP Help Portal – Download the content in PDF format – Search

The SAP Help Portal allows users to download content in PDF format for offline use. This feature is especially useful for accessing guides, manuals, and documentation without relying on an Internet connection and search for what you need easily.

Navigate to the Desired Content like the Application Help from the Home page for SAP Cloud ALM.

Search or browse for the specific documentation you need (e.g., product guides, user manuals, or release notes).

Look for a Download PDF link. This is typically located at the top of the document or in the navigation pane on the left and click in Create Custom PDF.

Note: You can download a PDF with a maximum of 200 entries.

SAP Community - Search

SAP Community offers extensive content on SAP Cloud ALM, managed tag SAP Cloud ALM.

Search here to find similar issues, questions reported by other members of the SAP Community or blog posts already created for those scenarios.

Related Content

  • SAP Learning Journey Getting Started with Support from SAP (Support Accreditation)
  • KBA  3038177 - How to log in Built-In Support and activate support functions
  • SAP Help Portal: Built-In Support
  • SAP Help Portal: Availability of Built-In Support in SAP Products
  • SAP Support Portal: Built-In Support
  • SAP Support Portal: Incident Solution Matching

entry.title: Re: Unable to call subsequent SOAP API in S/4 HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: CDS views for COBRA & COBRB tables related to settlem...
entry.content: Hello Sumanth, I'm so glad to hear it's helpful 🙂 Good luck and happy new year~

entry.title: Integration Advisor – payload-based qualification at time of MIG creation
entry.content:
Today I would like to share with you our newest feature: When creating a new Message Implementation Guideline (MIG) based on a payload, you can now select MIG nodes for automatic qualification based on the qualifier values in the payload. This feature should help to further simplify and speed-up the creation of MIGs. In this blog post I would like to give you a short overview of this new feature and how to use it.  

The picture before depicts the overall building blocks of Integration Advisor (of SAP Integration Suite). This blog post mainly relates to the Message Implementation Guideline area.

Recap: Using the qualification feature for MIGs

You probably have already heard about the so-called Qualification feature in Integration Advisor. Qualification means explicitly modeling the precise semantic meaning of a generic node in a message structure. By doing so, you reap the following key benefits:

  • More precise specification / documentation (e.g., in communication with your B2B Partner)
  • Simplified and extended payload validation at runtime
  • Significantly simplified mapping implementation (save up to 30-50% of otherwise required mapping functions)

You can find an excellent introduction to the qualification concept in this blog post: Link

Let me add a few additional thoughts on the following question: when should you qualify a MIG node and when shouldn't you do so?

The Qualification feature is most frequently used for EDI messages (e.g., from ASC X12 or UN/EDIFACT type systems) and SAP IDoc messages. For these messages you usually find a huge number of message nodes that are candidates for qualification (they have so called qualification markers, depicted by the grey arrow in the message structure). It is typically not advisable to use the qualification feature randomly at all the places where it would be possible.

You should use qualification, if in a specific scenario a node comes in different variants (with different qualifier values) and where one of the below applies:

  • There are significant structural differences in these different variants which you want to have covered in your detailed semantic validation at runtime.
  • The different variants of the node need to be mapped to/from different nodes in your Mapping Guideline (MAG).
  • Mapping details for the child nodes inside these node variants differ significantly. 

On the other hand, if the different variants of a node are very similar to each other and shall be mapped to/from the same node in your MAG, it is most often recommended to refrain from qualifying this node. Please note that using qualification variants comes with a slight overhead in your mapping: you need to map each of the qualified nodes (and all their sub nodes) separately. This is great if you need to map them differently. But it is duplicate effort if the mapping for all these qualified nodes is identical.

To illustrate this, let us have a look at the example in the next screenshot.

The screenshot depicts an EDI flat-file payload for the UN/EDIFACT message ORDERS (more specifically it is from the Edifact subset GS1 EANCOM). 

We can see that the DTM segment comes in two variants (depicted by the green box in above screenshot): one for order date/time (qualifier value 4) and one for message date/time (qualifier value 137). These variants differ in the used date time format, and we would like to ensure the incoming message uses the correct date time format. Moreover, we know that both DTM variants need to be mapped to different nodes on target side. As a result, we want to use qualification for the DTM node. 

In a similar way, there are three variants of the NAD segment (inside of SG2 segment group): one for buyer (qualifier value BY), one for ship to (qualifier value ST) and one for supplier (qualifier value SU). We want to ensure the incoming message contains complete address information for the ship-to party, while address information is not required for buyer and supplier parties. Therefore, SG2 shall be qualified as well in our MIG. 

In many real-life Edifact ORDERS MIGs, different variants of SG28 > QTY, SG28 > MOA and MOA are used. In our simplified example, however, all these nodes come only in one variant. Therefore, we choose to skip qualification for these nodes in our example MIG. 

MIG Creation with payload

The Create Message Implementation Guideline wizard has already offered the option to supply a payload (step Sample Payload) in the past. If you do, all nodes present in your payload will be automatically selected in the structure of your new MIG. Moreover, payload values will be copied as Example Values into your MIG (should the according option be selected).

With our feature extension you will now find an additional step Node Selection in the Creation Wizard. Here you can select those nodes of the message structure which shall be qualified automatically. Refer next screenshot for an illustration.

In our example, we have selected message nodes DTM and SG2 to be qualified.

Please note the following technical boundary conditions: In step Node Selection you can choose only those nodes, for which the message structure already offers the required qualifier marker. You can't use the new feature for situations where the node does not have the needed qualifier marker or the qualifying node does not yet have the required codelist or where you want to replace the standard codelist (for the qualifying node) with a different codelist. In such cases, just continue with the MIG creation without selecting this node and perform the qualification afterwards via the MIG Editor in the standard way.

Result of the MIG Creation

After the new MIG is created it contains already below customizations.

  1. Qualified nodes

The nodes chosen in the MIG Creation Wizard will already be qualified in the MIG. Here each qualifier value  present in your payload will create its own qualification variant. 

In our example, segment DTM got qualified for the values 4 and 137 while segment group SG2 got qualified for the values BY, ST and SU. Refer next screenshot for an illustration.  

Note that the used qualifier values must be part of the standard codelist. If the payload contains a value which is not part of the codelist, the qualification variant is ignored, and you are informed via a warning in column Status.

2. Selection of nodes and setting of example values

As before, all nodes used in your payload automatically get selected in your MIG. And your payload values are added as Example Values (if this option was chosen). 

This behavior has now also been extended and improved: Node selection and example values take the qualification variants into account. As you can see in the screenshot above, in SG2 qualified for the supplier (SU) only those nodes are selected which are indeed used in the SG2 specific for SU. And for the node "3164 - City name" only the payload value Walldorf from the supplier variant was added. 

Please note that mandatory nodes are automatically selected at the time of MIG creation which is not influenced by the payload. If your payload does not use a mandatory node, MIG Editor will inform you via a warning in column Status. In such a case you should investigate if your payload is incomplete or if this mandatory node is not used in your scenario. 

And one final comment: Our feature even allows you to trigger nested qualification by selecting nodes to be qualified inside other nodes to be qualified. In such a situation, a simplification is applied by adding identical inner (nested) qualification variants to all related outer qualification variants. Potentially not all inner qualification variants might apply to all outer qualification variants - in this case you can simply deselect or remove the unwanted inner qualification variants.   

Conclusion

This new feature helps you in building your Message Implementation Guidelines (MIGs) even faster and with less manual customization effort.  

Further reading

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/integration-advisor-overview-of-components-for-... 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/integration-content-advisor-create-a-customized...

entry.title: Re: SAP Captcha in SAP CDC - Gigya
entry.content:
Hi @S_Sarkar ,

Good day.

SAP Customer Data Cloud (CDC) supports various CAPTCHA solutions, including its own.

  • Whether SAP charges for enabling its CAPTCHA isn't explicitly stated in the documentation.
  • For clarity, contact SAP support or your account representative for accurate pricing and cost details.
  • Informing SAP before enabling CAPTCHA isn’t mandatory per the documentation, but it’s a good practice to consult with SAP support to address potential billing or technical concerns.

For more information, refer to help.sap.com.

 

Regards,
Preethi G
SAP CDC Consultant

entry.title: Re: How to make a acuired SAC model 24 months rolling
entry.content:
Thanks @andrepaccagnella,

Does it impact the performance if you use a Data Action to filter? The reason we want only 23 months and current is due to capacity. I can imagine sending the query and filtering it afterwards might be to much for the system? 

Best regards,

Rick

entry.title: Re: Request to add a column in Tax Reconciliation Account Balance App
entry.content: @omer_k Question has been taken to our development team. I may check back here with specific questions as we proceed. Thanks for your patience.

entry.title: GRC PC Reports for Maintain Users Responsible for Entity
entry.content:
Hi All,

can you please suggest for which GRC PC reports 'Maintain Users Responsible for Entity' is applicable

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Maintain restrictions in business role
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

May I get your kind input?

I created a Business Role regarding Business Partners. The goal is to be able to see only Business Partners with the role "customer". The created Role has the following restrictions:

1) Restricted permission to write, read and value help in the access categories 

2) The following Business Catalogs

 

3) In the restrictions itself I maintained the BP-Role restriction to be able to see and manage BP only with the role "customer" (the other restrictions I put on "unrestricted")

In the tests I assigned only this role to me and if I open the "manage business partner" App I see all of the partners. So, the restriction doesn't work.

Does anyone know how this problem could be fixed?

entry.title: Re: Not able to connect to system while creating a projec...
entry.content:
Hi,
Different templates performs different requests to the on-premise system. Could be for example that the OData V2 Catalog for your system works, but the OData V4 Catalog required by a specific template, fails to be accessed in your system.
You can find specific troubleshooting regarding SAP Fiori application generation from SAP Business Application Studio here: https://ga.support.sap.com/dtp/viewer/index.html#/tree/3046/actions/45995:48363:53594
I suggest also to check this specific topic - discussing the OData V4 Catalog authentication: https://ga.support.sap.com/dtp/viewer/index.html#/tree/3046/actions/45995:48363:53594:48366:51257

And also in the guided answers of SAP Business Application studio I shared before, you can check your OData Catalogs through the Service Center - as described here: https://gad5158842f.us2.hana.ondemand.com/dtp/viewer/#/tree/2827/actions/41344:41346:57775:57778/?version=current

Thanks,

Rotem

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud and Props table
entry.content:
Hello @durgesh19 

Are you in Public Commerce Cloud ? This query works (has been tested) only for Azure SQL technology.

entry.title: Re: Could not read working days information from TFACS ta...
entry.content: I had this issue and sharing with the Fact and analytical model space solved the it for me.

entry.title: Re: [SAP MDK] Displaying Sub-Properties in Object Table F...
entry.content: Worked

entry.title: Creating Roles and Managing Authorizations in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
I am working on SAP Build Apps and need some assistance with managing roles and authorizations effectively. Specifically, I have the following queries:

  1. How can I create a role with specific objects or actions in SAP Build Apps? For example, if I want to grant access to certain features or functionalities, what is the best approach to define such roles?

  2. What is the recommended way to configure and manage authorizations for these roles to ensure that users only access the features assigned to them?

  3. Are there specific tools or configurations in SAP Build or SAP BTP that I should use to streamline the process?

Any guidance, best practices, or relevant documentation links would be highly appreciated.

Looking forward to your support.

entry.title: Re: Change document types in Free Form Payment
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: SF LMS iContent clean-up approach
entry.content: Hi, thank you for the FYI, the deleted contents would mostly be the old versions of the same files, as the content is not being replaced, but rather all versions are kept.

entry.title: Using SAP Migrate to Modify or Upload Data in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Can SAP Migrate be utilized to modify or upload data directly into an SAP Build App?

If yes, I would appreciate guidance on:

  1. The process or steps required to integrate SAP Migrate with SAP Build Apps for data upload or modification.
  2. Supported data formats and any prerequisites for this integration.
  3. Any limitations or considerations when using SAP Migrate with SAP Build Apps.

If no, are there alternative tools or methods within the SAP ecosystem for handling such tasks effectively?

Thank you in advance for your insights and recommendations!

entry.title: Re: Supported GSPs for DRC Cloud Edition India
entry.content: I like to understand why there are three options in the Cloud DRC Application?

entry.title: Re: 'Document Type' doesn't match the values in 'Layout and Sequence' list
entry.content: Is there any configuration regarding document numbering related to A/R Correction Invoices?
